name: hover
description: AI that hovers over your dev workflow. Natural language frontend testing.

scripts.dev:example:basic-app: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter basic-app dev

scripts.dev:example:canvas-paint: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter canvas-paint dev
